on

Secretary General of the Nigeria Olympics Committee, NOC, Tunji Popoola has predicted a podium finish for the Super Falcons at the 2024 Olympic Games.

The Super Falcons are making a return to the Olympics since the 2008 edition in Beijing.

Randy Waldrum’s side are drawn in a tough group with Spain, Japan and Brazil.

Popoola is, however, rooting for the nine-time African champions to win a medal in Paris.

“We have a strong football team, I will tip them for a medal,” he declared.

“Also we should expect medals in athletics, weightlifting and wrestling.

“We will surprise Nigerians with a bag of medals.”
